name_en: LO℮w℮🌟New 🆕Medium Pleated Nappa Sheepskin Flamenco Coin Purse 💥 It tightens with a drawstring and ties with the signature twisted knot. The medium version is crafted in shiny Nappa sheepskin, hand-cut, stitched, and sewn. *Medium Flamenco fits a large wallet, all models of phones, or an A5 notebook, a 500ml water bottle, and sunglasses case *Crossbody, Shoulder, or Handheld *Detachable and adjustable shoulder strap *Exquisite magnetic closure *Leather lining*
